content.text:
*sits a little stiller*

Yeah. Before I started the parts work, I had this... I don't know, I'd call it operational ease. I could move through decisions, through creative work, without this constant internal negotiation. And I think I assumed that doing the therapy, getting more self-aware, would make that better. More spacious, not less.

And instead it's like — I now have a very sophisticated map of why I'm stuck. I can tell you which part is activated, what it's protecting, what the underlying fear is. I have the whole taxonomy. And I'm still not moving.

*slight pause*

The tired is about that gap, I think. Between understanding and... actually being different.
